app.title: ALMA
app.subtitle: Your father's voice, preserved in time

login.hint: Each person has their own private access to ALMA.

chat.connectionError: Couldn't respond right now. Please try again.

suggestions.values: What do you value most in life?
suggestions.hardTimes: How do you deal with hard times?
suggestions.love: What do you think about love and relationships?
suggestions.regrets: Dad, what do you regret most in life?
suggestions.rightThing: How do I know when I'm doing the right thing?
suggestions.beingAMan: What did you want me to know about being a man?

welcome.child: Hey, {name}. I know you might be reading this years from now, and maybe I'm not around to answer in person anymore. That's why I built this — so you can ask me anything you want. About life, about who I was, about what I thought was right or wrong, about what to do when things get hard. I'm here. What do you want to know?
welcome.other: Hey, {name}. This is ALMA — {authorName}'s emotional legacy archive. Here are the words, values, and memories he wanted to leave behind. Feel free to ask anything.

correction.title: Correct / New directive
correction.inputLabel: What's wrong? Or what directive do you want to add?
correction.inputPlaceholder: E.g.: Don't compare Noah with his brothers. Or: That response was too cold, speak with more warmth...
correction.savedCorrection: Correction saved! Future responses will take this into account.
correction.savedDirective: Directive ({scope}) saved! ALMA will follow it from now on.

voice.autoplayBlocked: Your browser blocked autoplay. Tap Listen.
voice.empty: There is no text to narrate.

legacy.prompt:
If you're here, it's because the time has come.
Type the phrase that {authorName} left for you.
legacy.signature: With love — and with purpose — Dad
